name: Brie Larson
description: (Re-upload) Brie Larson, born Brianne Sidonie Desaulniers on October 1, 1989, in Sacramento, California, is an acclaimed American actress and filmmaker. She began her career young, appearing in TV series like "Raising Dad" and "United States of Tara," and transitioned to film with roles in "13 Going on 30" and "Scott Pilgrim vs. the World." Larson's breakthrough came with "Short Term 12" (2013), leading to her Oscar-winning performance in "Room" (2015). She stars as Captain Marvel in the Marvel Cinematic Universe, debuting in "Captain Marvel" (2019) and continuing in subsequent films. Larson directed and starred in "Unicorn Store" (2017) and advocates for social causes such as gender equality. Her versatile talent and advocacy make her a prominent Hollywood figure.
creator: deadcool
